Title: Got a call from Melisa regarding the printer issue
Notes:
Received a call from Melisa regarding an issue with her printer. I connected to her computer remotely to investigate the problem. I first checked the printer's IP settings, confirmed the printer was powered on, and ran the print spooler service. I attempted to ping the printer's IP, but the issue persisted.

To further troubleshoot, I ran an IP scanner to detect the printer's IP address but could not find it. I then pinged all the parameters, but the host was unreachable. Despite these efforts, the printer still could not connect, and the actual IP of the printer could not be confirmed.

I advised the user to turn the printer off and back on, but the issue remained unresolved. For further troubleshooting, I handed the case over to another technician to continue the resolution process.

Title: Got a call from Melisa regarding the printer issue
Notes: User had issue connecting to the printer, Assisted from a video call. User had an issue with the port, Cox assisted them few days ago, since then the printer is down. Issue needs a visit. User will schedule the visit after checking with Cox.

Title: search engine
Notes:
As per the email from Melissa...

Connect to her system she is having issue with the Search engine on chrome....

so went to the chrome settings remove the unwanted search engines and make google as the default on on both the browsers...

Also reboot the system and checked again...

Also checked for any Extension and other chrome settings...

Everything was fine......user said she has one more computer and she want us to check that as  well...

verify the same settings on other device as well......hence closing the ticket....

Title: Update filed patched on the Bus-Center-PC & Melsdesktop
Notes:
Worked on the failed patches and logged into the ManageEngine portal to review the pending updates for the systems Bus-Center-PC & Melsdesktop.

Downloaded and manually installed the applicable failed driver and BIOS updates, including:

  • Ethernet Connection (17) I219-LM [PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_1A1C] (12.19.2.66)

  • Alder Lake-S GT1 (UHD Graphics 770) [PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_4690] (32.0.101.7082)

  • OptiPlex 7400 AIO BIOS (1.1.56)

Completed the installation process and verified the updated versions on both systems.

Performed a post-installation scan, and all previously failed patches are now successfully updated and reflecting compliant status in the ManageEngine console.
